title: Hooks Workspaces Specs
description: React data hooks for **Hooks Workspaces Specs**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.
context: React data hooks for **Hooks Workspaces Specs**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.

rules.requirement: hooks load workspaces and spec tree metadata
rules:
The hooks MUST call `listWorkspaces` and spec tree/list methods on `client:port-workspaces-specs`.

When a spec detail view is active, the spec hooks MUST also load structured spec context through `getSpecContext()` and preserve that structure for the consuming component.

rules.requirement: workspace tree refreshes on global poll
rules:
Tree metadata MUST refresh on the global poll interval when:

- the sidebar is expanded (stacked Workspaces block visible), OR
- the center context is **workspaces-hub**.

When the sidebar is collapsed **and** the center is not workspaces-hub or an open spec,
tree hooks MUST NOT refetch on poll ticks; cached metadata MUST be retained until
Workspaces becomes visible again or the workspaces hub opens.

Pausing poll via `enabled: false` MUST NOT discard in-memory tree data; re-enabling
MUST show cached data immediately and MAY catch up when `refreshKey` has advanced.

Per-spec detail loads when a spec tab becomes visible — unchanged.

scenarios.requirement: hooks load workspaces and spec tree metadata
scenarios.name: Workspaces hook calls list endpoint

scenarios.requirement: hooks load workspaces and spec tree metadata
scenarios.name: Spec tree metadata loads per workspace
then: AND nodes show titles from metadata

scenarios.requirement: hooks load workspaces and spec tree metadata
scenarios.name: Search uses workspaces port filter
when: user searches specs scoped to workspace

scenarios.requirement: hooks load workspaces and spec tree metadata
scenarios.name: Spec hook preserves structured context payload
when: spec detail hook requests context for the selected spec
then: AND the returned entries[] and warnings[] remain available to the view without markdown flattening

scenarios.requirement: workspace tree refreshes on global poll
scenarios.name: Tree refetches on global poll tick when Workspaces visible
given: sidebar expanded and Workspaces section active
then: AND new spec file appears as node

scenarios.requirement: workspace tree refreshes on global poll
scenarios.name: Collapsed sidebar skips tree poll
then: AND cache retained until Workspaces section shown expanded

scenarios.requirement: workspace tree refreshes on global poll
scenarios.name: Re-expanding sidebar retains cached tree
when: user expands sidebar before next poll tick
then: cached tree data is still available
AND Workspaces list renders without a loading flash

scenarios.requirement: workspace tree refreshes on global poll
scenarios.name: Selection preserved across refresh
when: tree poll completes without structural change
